title: Arama Algoritmalari
subtitle: Dogrusal ve binary arama ornekleri.
code:
def linear_search(arr, target):
    for i, value in enumerate(arr):
        if value == target:
            return i
    return -1


def binary_search(arr, target):
    left, right = 0, len(arr) - 1

    while left <= right:
        mid = (left + right) // 2

        if arr[mid] == target:
            return mid
        elif arr[mid] < target:
            left = mid + 1
        else:
            right = mid - 1

    return -1


numbers = [4, 12, 7, 23, 9, 1, 18]
target = 23

linear_result = linear_search(numbers, target)
print(f"Dogrusal arama: {target} indeks {linear_result}'de bulundu")

# Binary arama icin dizi siralanmali
sorted_numbers = sorted(numbers)
print("\nSirali dizi:", sorted_numbers)

binary_result = binary_search(sorted_numbers, target)
print(f"Binary arama: {target} indeks {binary_result}'de bulundu")

not_found = linear_search(numbers, 99)
print(f"\n99 araniyor (bulunamayacak): {not_found}")

# Python'un kendi 'in' operatoru ve index()
print("\n'in' operatoru ile kontrol:", target in numbers)
print("index() ile konum:", numbers.index(target))
